# testing Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-26

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.7 (frontend); PocketBase 0.36.5 Go binary (backend — no custom Go code required) + Vue 3.5 + Vite 6.1 + Vant 4.9 (mobile UI) + @vueuse/core 12 (swipe) + Chart.js 4.4 + vue-chartjs 5.3 (pie chart) + Tailwind CSS v4 + lucide-vue-next 0.469 + pocketbase 0.21 (JS SDK) (001-home-expense-tracker)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.7 (frontend); PocketBase 0.36.5 Go binary (backend — no custom Go code required): Follow standard conventions
